subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto her who attained unto the daybreak of meanings and utterance, when the All-Merciful came with the hosts of revelation and inspiration [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا للتی فازت بفجر المعانی و البیان اذ اتی الرحمن بجنود الوحی و الالهام
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
